summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kshana Contour Boutique website. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI and integration testing successful with all key features functional.

integration_issues.issue: Service type dropdown selection has timing issues during automated testing

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (About, Gallery, Services, Contact)
Login modal opens with Customer/Admin portal options
Admin dashboard displays stats cards and charts
All admin sections accessible (Orders, Employees, Materials, Reports, Gallery)
Customer login works with phone + DOB authentication
WhatsApp floating button visible on all pages
All 19 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Order creation, payment recording, status updates functional
Employee, Material, Gallery CRUD operations working
Dashboard stats and charts data loading correctly
